message:
chore(deps): switch published deps from local paths to crates.io

Replace /dp/ path dependencies with crates.io versions for all crates
that are now published: asupersync v0.2.5, ftui-* v0.2.1, fastmcp-* v0.2.0,
sqlmodel-* v0.2.0. Remove asupersync [patch.crates-io] override.

Remaining path deps (not yet on crates.io): beads_rust, toon/tru,
sqlmodel-frankensqlite, frankensearch-*.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
